intent: 2-bedroom where the master sits at the rear for quietness, with its ensuite sharing a rear plumbing wall with the kitchen. Standard bedroom is at the front near the living area — useful when one occupant needs the quietest rear position and the other wants easy LDK access.

rear wet strip — ensuite shares plumbing wall with kitchen
standard bedroom at the front near living
